data.title: International Dance League starts first official season after $7 million funding round, aiming to elevate dance as a global sport.
data.description: In Los Angeles, International Dance League (IDL) has unveiled its inaugural competitive season, a significant step towards recognizing dance as a professional worldwide sport. This development comes after the league's official introduction and a prosperous fundraising round of $7 million spearheaded by Elysian Park Ventures in November. The launch of IDL comes at a crucial time for dance, which stands as one of the most popular sports in the United States, holding a prominent position in the sporting landscape.
SCOTUS releases no opinions on the Fed's Cook case today.

data.title: Codexis to manufacture 50 g siRNA using ECO Synthesis® Manufacturing Platform for pharmaceutical company.
data.description: Today, in Redwood City, California, Codexis, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDXS), a prominent enzymatic solutions provider for therapeutics manufacturing, revealed a new deal with an innovative pharmaceutical firm. The agreement involves the manufacturing of 50...

data.title: Private Advisor Group launches Fit to Serve Foundation to support advisor wellbeing and community impact. Inaugural Fit to Serve Golf Classic in April.
data.description: Fit to Serve, a newly established charitable foundation by Private Advisor Group, will host its first Fit to Serve Golf Classic in April in Morristown, New Jersey. The foundation aims to empower financial professionals and improve their overall well-being. The event is scheduled for March 4, 2026, as announced by the organization. This marks the beginning of the Foundation's efforts to support its mission.

data.title: Ashley M. Carlucci appointed Chief Nurse Executive for Allegheny Health Network, effective April 13.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on March 4, 2026, Allegheny Health Network (AHN) disclosed the selection of Ashley M. Carlucci, DNP, MHA, RN, CEN, CENP, as its incoming Chief Nurse Executive (CNE), commencing on April 13. Carlucci, equipped with a comprehensive background and demonstrated success, is set to assume this crucial role within the organization.

data.title: Willis Lease Finance Corp appoints Marilyn Gan as Head of Origination, Asia Pacific to lead efforts in Asia, leveraging her experience in aviation industry.
data.description: In Coconut Creek, Florida on March 4, 2026, Willis Lease Finance Corporation (NASDAQ: WLFC) revealed the selection of Marilyn Gan as the Head of Origination, Asia Pacific. With WLFC being the primary lessor of commercial aircraft engines and an international aviation services provider, Gan has been tasked with spearheading origination endeavors in Asia for WLFC’s owned portfolio and funds overseen by Willis Aviation Capital, the Company's new asset manager. Gan's appointment comes on the heels of her vast background in crafting debt and equity transactions and cultivating key alliances within the aviation sector.

data.title: ez1095 software introduces "e- File Direct" feature to simplify ACA filing. Faster, easier, more reliable e-filing. Download now.
data.description: Halfpricesoft.com has introduced a new feature in their ez1095 software that streamlines 1095/1094 filing by offering a faster, easier, and more reliable direct e-filing option. Businesses gearing up for ACA reporting deadlines can download and test this software with no obligation. Based on a press release from REDMOND, Washington on March 4, 2026, this update aims to simplify the filing process for employers and HR departments, aiding in meeting regulatory requirements efficiently.

data.title: Vander Hyde Services warns homeowners about CO risks in early spring despite assumptions; CO risks persist beyond winter.
data.description: In Grand Rapids, Michigan on March 4, 2026, Vander Hyde Services emphasized that the transition from winter to spring does not eliminate the threat of carbon monoxide exposure for homeowners. Despite the misconception that CO risks diminish as the weather gets warmer, the company warns against this assumption. It is crucial for homeowners to remain vigilant year-round as CO dangers persist regardless of the season.

data.title: Beckman Foundation announces 2026 conference attendance, sponsorships for researchers in chemistry & life sciences.
data.description: In Irvine, California on March 4, 2026, the Arnold and Mabel Beckman Foundation, a 501(c)(3) grantmaking organization, revealed its commitment to backing researchers and nonprofit research institutions in advancing cutting-edge discoveries in chemistry and the life sciences. The foundation aims to facilitate the next wave of breakthroughs in these fields.

data.title: AI fails at customer service in real call, highlighting need for humans in businesses. Video released by AnswerConnect.
data.description: A recent phone call video depicts AI attempting to mimic human behavior, illustrating the limitations of replacing humans with artificial intelligence. The video, released by AnswerConnect in Portland, Oregon on March 4, 2026, showcases an interaction where AI struggles to emulate human-like responses. This serves as a reminder for businesses to carefully consider the potential drawbacks of relying solely on AI. It highlights the importance of human presence and intuition in certain situations.

data.title: BPM LLP opened a San Diego office to support clients in life sciences, nonprofits, and wealth management, enhancing its West Coast reach.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, BPM LLP, a prominent public accounting and advisory firm in the United States ranking among the top 35, revealed the inauguration of its latest office in San Diego, California. This strategic move aims to strengthen BPM's presence on the West Coast and foster development in the area of life.

data.title: Woodforest National Bank partners with Greenlight to provide account holders with complimentary access to financial education app.
data.description: In a recent development on March 4, 2026, in The Woodlands, Texas, Woodforest National Bank® revealed a new collaboration with Greenlight® Financial Technology, Inc. ("Greenlight"). This partnership grants account holders with free access to Greenlight's financial platform. This move aims to assist families by offering valuable resources and tools.

data.title: Air Tahiti Nui opens direct route Papeete-Sydney (PPT-SYD) to strengthen international network.
data.description: French Polynesia's Air Tahiti Nui revealed plans for expanding its global reach by introducing a direct flight route between Papeete and Sydney (PPT–SYD) effective March 4, 2026. This move is a key element in the airline's efforts to enhance its presence in the international market by providing more convenient travel options.

data.title: Coherix relocates to 25,000-square-foot North American headquarters in Ann Arbor, Michigan.
data.description: Ann Arbor, Michigan - On March 4, 2026, Coherix, a top provider of AI-driven quality-control solutions for the automotive and electronics sectors, relocated to a spacious 25,000-square-foot North American base encompassing headquarters, manufacturing, and product development facilities.

data.title: Sandler Partners hires Miranda Paine as Director, Channel - SoCal, bolstering regional support team.
data.description: Independent Technology Distributor Sandler Partners has expanded its regional support team by welcoming Miranda Paine as Director of Channel for Southern California. The company, based in Redondo Beach, California, made the announcement on March 4, 2026. Sandler Partners, a prominent player in the technology solutions sector, continues to strengthen its presence with this addition.

data.title: High Tide and NuLeaf Naturals are founding members of U.S. National Compassionate Care Council. High Tide has Nasdaq: HITI, TSXV: HITI, FSE: 2LYA.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, High Tide Inc. (Nasdaq: HITI) (TSXV: HITI) (FSE: 2LYA) announced its position as a retail-focused company with emphasis on delivering practical benefits within the cannabis industry. The company, based in Calgary, AB, is a key player in the U.S. market for hemp-derived CBD products.

data.title: Airiver Medical gets FDA's Breakthrough Device Designation for pulmonary drug-coated balloon. First patient treated in trial.
data.description: Airiver Medical, a clinical stage company based in BROOKLYN PARK, Minn., announced on March 4, 2026, that they have received a designation that could potentially lead to faster access for U.S. patients to their innovative technologies. This designation will benefit patients dealing with specific respiratory tract conditions. The development marks a significant milestone for the company as they continue to advance in their mission to help those in need.

data.title: Wendy's to build over 60 new restaurants in Mexico as part of Latin America growth strategy.
data.description: Mexico is a vital part of Wendy's plan for growth in Latin America as they move to expand in the region. The Wendy's Company revealed today the completion of two franchise deals, paving the way for over 60 additional locations to be established. This marks a significant step in their strategy to increase presence and market share in Latin America.
